stories.title: John Deere owners will get the right to repair equipment under FTC settlement
stories.summary: John Deere reached an FTC settlement granting equipment owners and independent repair shops the right to fix tractors and farm machinery, a landmark win for the right-to-repair movement.

stories.title: GPT-5.6
stories.summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.6, its latest flagship model, drawing heavy discussion on Hacker News over capability gains and benchmark improvements.

stories.title: Train sim created by just one person is being called the best ever made
stories.summary: A solo developer's train simulation is being praised as one of the best ever made, highlighting how small teams can ship ambitious software with modern tooling.

stories.title: AI content is everywhere on social media, especially LinkedIn
stories.summary: An analysis shows AI-generated posts now saturate social feeds, with LinkedIn among the most affected, raising questions about authenticity and detection.

stories.title: Girls just wanna have fast MPMC queues with bounded waiting
stories.summary: A write-up presents a wait-free MPMC queue with bounded waiting, a concurrency data-structure result of interest to systems and infrastructure engineers.

stories.title: What's slowing down the AI buildout
stories.summary: A piece argues the AI expansion is increasingly bottlenecked by power-grid capacity and energy constraints rather than model research alone.

stories.title: Building a real-time AI tutor for 5-year-olds
stories.summary: Ello details how it built a real-time AI reading tutor that responds to a child in under 1000ms, blending speech, vision, and language models.

stories.title: Ben Bernanke Joins Anthropic Oversight Trust
stories.summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Ben Bernanke joined Anthropic's Long-Term Benefit & Oversight Trust, adding economic-policy expertise to AI governance.

stories.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an 'Opus-class model'
stories.summary: SpaceXAI launched Grok 4.5, with Elon Musk calling it an 'Opus-class' model, intensifying competition among frontier LLM providers.

stories.title: Google's deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
stories.summary: Google's synthetic-media detection tool helped debunk an AI-generated hoax image of Mitch McConnell, showcasing practical deepfake defense.
